prompt: Show one proposal draft with its owner, status, due date, and private review notes.
List the proposals waiting for review and let me sort them by owner or due date.
Build a proposal review board that groups items into draft, in review, and approved.
My booking service gets slow every afternoon. Show me what is happening and what I should change before it gets worse.
This service has outgrown my current node. Give me a migration plan that keeps it running while I decide what to do.
I only want to charge for priority access if demand really justifies more infrastructure. Show me a plan tied to actual resource pressure.
My service is suddenly popular. Compare staying local, moving to a stronger node, or splitting it into a dedicated service node.
I need a private workspace where I can draft a proposal before sharing it with my team.
My team needs a shared review space where we can critique each other's proposals.
Three teams need to coordinate on one deliverable. Build a shared meeting-room style workspace for that handoff.
I've been tracking my availability privately. Now I want clients to be able to book appointments with me.
I'm a massage therapist. Build a booking module that shows my available times, services, rates, and location.
Link my booking module to payments so clients pay when they book, and connect confirmed bookings to my review flow.
When someone messages me asking about a session, route that conversation into my booking workflow automatically.
Build a local resume editor that helps me compose a polished one-page resume with structured sections and export options.
Create a personal daily command center for work with calendar, tasks, contacts, notes, and daily priorities in one place.
Build a rapid data-entry table for structured rows like expenses, time logs, or counts, with simple totals and export.
Create a personal job search tracker with one Kanban board, structured application cards, follow-up dates, and local storage.
Build a small-business customer tracker with contacts, follow-up dates, invoices, and due items in one local workspace.
Create a local software inventory tracker with vendor records, version details, categories, and exportable reports.
Build a grant-writing workspace with section templates, drafting guidance, a reference directory, and export for the final proposal.
Create a local invoicing tool for a small business that lets me make invoices, record payments, and track unpaid balances.
Build an employee shift scheduler for a small business with weekly schedules, hour totals, searchable history, and printable exports.
Create a local inventory-control module that tracks stock counts, costs, selling prices, purchases, sales, and period reports.
Build a local time-tracking and invoicing module that logs billable hours, generates invoices, and tracks payment status.
Create a local decision-table editor for small business rules, with fact definitions, rule validation, and a simple test harness.
Build a local survey data collector with a form builder, response entry, basic analytics, and CSV import/export.
Build a lightweight workflow tool that lets non-technical users create a simple form, connect it to one action, and view results.
Create a bounded low-code builder for internal desktop-style business tools with visual design, simple scripting, and local data connections.
Create a starter shell for a bounded internal workflow tool with navigation, a shared layout, intake form, and built-in help surface.
